student_action: Treat all trades as educational examples, not recommendations; do not risk money you cannot afford to lose.
why_it_matters: Derivatives and options are leveraged and can lose more quickly than linear instruments.

student_action: Do not infer legality or ethics from first principles; local market customs differ.
why_it_matters: A behavior accepted in one market can be disallowed in another.

student_action: Before changing a strategy, order type, execution route, or operational process, get manager/compliance approval in writing.
why_it_matters: A written chain protects the trader when rules are ambiguous.

student_action: Separate trading from risk oversight; never let the trader be the only risk manager.
why_it_matters: Fraud and control failures are meta-risks, not market-risk edge.
